TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-seediq_dakis 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: m m a tikuh kari maanu di kesaun a pusuta bale a rudan nita seediq.
S.PHON: m m a tikuħ kaɾi maanu di kesaun a pusuta bale a ɾudan nita seediq.
S.FORM: m m a tikuh kari maanu di kesaun a pusuta bale a rudan nita seediq.
S.PHON: m m a tikuħ kaɾi maanu di kesaun a pusuta bale a ɾudan nita seediq.
S.TRANSL: 我要述說一個故事,所謂我們賽德克族的始祖起源之說.
I am going to tell a story, the so-called origin of our Seediq ancestors.

S.FORM: e kari nii uri uri ge e tngesaankuna ima di sk a sktiwas pawan uri daka skpawan nawi peni.
S.PHON: e kaɾi nii uɾi uɾi ge e tŋesaankuna ima di sk a sktiwas pawan uɾi daka skpawan nawi peni.
S.FORM: e kari nii uri uri ge e tngesaankuna ima di sk a sktiwas pawan uri daka skpawan nawi peni.
S.PHON: e kaɾi nii uɾi uɾi ge e tŋesaankuna ima di sk a sktiwas pawan uɾi daka skpawan nawi peni.
S.TRANSL: 這故事是已過世的Tiwas Pawan和 Pawan Nawi教我的.
The story was taught to me by the late Tiwas Pawan and Pawan Nawi.

W.TRANSL: 教<完成>教-處焦=1SG.主格=3SG.屬格

S.FORM: ani si huwa ka bobo de egu ka rdrudan nodaanmu smiling uri ha m mesa ka karina.
S.PHON: ani si ħuwa ka bobo de egu ka ɾdɾudan nodaanmu smiliŋ uɾi ħa m mesa ka kaɾina.
S.FORM: ani si huwa ka bobo de egu ka rdrudan nodaanmu smiling uri ha m mesa ka karina.
S.PHON: ani si ħuwa ka bobo de egu ka ɾdɾudan nodaanmu smiliŋ uɾi ħa m mesa ka kaɾina.
S.TRANSL: 但是之後,我也請教過許許多多的族老,他是這麼說的.
But afterwards, I have also consulted many elders, and the following is what he said.

S.FORM: en eniqan kingan a e dgiyaq e dgiyaq e dgiyaq paru ha bnuhun kesaunna.
S.PHON: en eniqan kiŋan a e dgijaq e dgijaq e dgijaq paɾu ħa bnuħun kesaunna.
S.FORM: en eniqan kingan a e dgiyaq e dgiyaq e dgiyaq paru ha bnuhun kesaunna.
S.PHON: en eniqan kiŋan a e dgijaq e dgijaq e dgijaq paɾu ħa bnuħun kesaunna.
S.TRANSL: 有座大山脈.
There is a huge mountain.

S.FORM: bnuhun mesa karita ita.
S.PHON: bnuħun mesa kaɾita ita.
S.FORM: bnuhun mesa karita ita.
S.PHON: bnuħun mesa kaɾita ita.
S.TRANSL: 我們稱 為Bnuhun.
We call Bnuhun.

S.FORM: bnuhun nii na saya di na kiya ka han han a han maduk seediq peni.
S.PHON: bnuħun nii na saja di na kija ka ħan ħan a ħan maduk seediq peni.
S.FORM: bnuhun nii na saya di na kiya ka han han a han maduk seediq peni.
S.PHON: bnuħun nii na saja di na kija ka ħan ħan a ħan maduk seediq peni.
S.TRANSL: 這個Bnuhun現在已經成為賽德克人去打獵的地方.
This Bnuhun now has been the area to go hunting for the Seediq.

S.FORM: a maduk mesa ka toda ha.
S.PHON: a maduk mesa ka toda ħa.
S.FORM: a maduk mesa ka toda ha.
S.PHON: a maduk mesa ka toda ħa.
S.TRANSL: Toda人稱為maduk.
Todas call "maduk" .

S.FORM: adukun asita kesai ita ita tgdaya peni.
S.PHON: adukun asita kesai ita ita tgdaja peni.
S.FORM: adukun asita kesai ita ita tgdaya peni.
S.PHON: adukun asita kesai ita ita tgdaja peni.

TRANSL.notes: 我們Tgdaya人稱之為Dupun (狩獵的地方).

S.TRANSL: 我們Tgdaya人稱之為Dupun .
We, the Tgdaya call it Dupun.

S.FORM: ani dehuk saya na lmiqu nii na egu riyung ani maanu ka truma hiya camac peni.
S.PHON: ani deħuk saja na lmiqu nii na egu ɾijuŋ ani maanu ka tɾuma ħija ʦamaʦ peni.
S.FORM: ani dehuk saya na lmiqu nii na egu riyung ani maanu ka truma hiya camac peni.
S.PHON: ani deħuk saja na lmiqu nii na egu ɾijuŋ ani maanu ka tɾuma ħija ʦamaʦ peni.
S.TRANSL: 即使至今,山區域內仍有很多動物.
Even until now, in the mountain area there are still many animals.

S.FORM: ma cbeyo si cbeyo cbeyo ye wada so kenu a kenu cbeyo na ini kelai ini kelai smepu si na.
S.PHON: ma ʦbejo si ʦbejo ʦbejo je wada so kenu a kenu ʦbejo na ini kelai ini kelai smepu si na.
S.FORM: ma cbeyo si cbeyo cbeyo ye wada so kenu a kenu cbeyo na ini kelai ini kelai smepu si na.
S.PHON: ma ʦbejo si ʦbejo ʦbejo je wada so kenu a kenu ʦbejo na ini kelai ini kelai smepu si na.
S.TRANSL: 然後以前,很久很久以前,好像不知道該如何計算了.
Then in the past, long long time ago, like we don't know how to count.

S.FORM: e kika dgiyaq kesaun bnuhun nii na eniqan kingan qhuni paru.
S.PHON: e kika dgijaq kesaun bnuħun nii na eniqan kiŋan qħuni paɾu.
S.FORM: e kika dgiyaq kesaun bnuhun nii na eniqan kingan qhuni paru.
S.PHON: e kika dgijaq kesaun bnuħun nii na eniqan kiŋan qħuni paɾu.
S.TRANSL: 在所謂的Bnuhun有一棵大樹.
In the so-called Bnuhun, there existed a big tree.

S.FORM: n ye so ru kari na rudan ye paru riyung sa qhuni nii ma kika qhuni nii ne qhu qhuni nii ge ga so hari ga tloong maanu di e dgiyaq peni.
S.PHON: n je so ɾu kaɾi na ɾudan je paɾu ɾijuŋ sa qħuni nii ma kika qħuni nii ne qħu qħuni nii ge ga so ħaɾi ga tlooŋ maanu di e dgijaq peni.
S.FORM: n ye so ru kari na rudan ye paru riyung sa qhuni nii ma kika qhuni nii ne qhu qhuni nii ge ga so hari ga tloong maanu di e dgiyaq peni.
S.PHON: n je so ɾu kaɾi na ɾudan je paɾu ɾijuŋ sa qħuni nii ma kika qħuni nii ne qħu qħuni nii ge ga so ħaɾi ga tlooŋ maanu di e dgijaq peni.
S.TRANSL: 族老說這棵樹非常大,所以像是座落在山巒之間.
The elders said that this tree is very big, so it's like it sits within the mountains.

S.FORM: ma netunsu so stheyaan stheyaan mita di na qitaansu peni bubaro riyung qhuni nii paru riyung.
S.PHON: ma netunsu so stħejaan stħejaan mita di na qitaansu peni bubaɾo ɾijuŋ qħuni nii paɾu ɾijuŋ.
S.FORM: ma netunsu so stheyaan stheyaan mita di na qitaansu peni bubaro riyung qhuni nii paru riyung.
S.PHON: ma netunsu so stħejaan stħejaan mita di na qitaansu peni bubaɾo ɾijuŋ qħuni nii paɾu ɾijuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 如果你從遠處看,你看,這棵樹很高很大.
Then if you look from afar, you see, this tree is very tall and very big.

S.FORM: ma kika qhuni nii na en pusu na peni na eniqan lhengo paru.
S.PHON: ma kika qħuni nii na en pusu na peni na eniqan lħeŋo paɾu.
S.FORM: ma kika qhuni nii na en pusu na peni na eniqan lhengo paru.
S.PHON: ma kika qħuni nii na en pusu na peni na eniqan lħeŋo paɾu.
S.TRANSL: 然後這棵樹的底部,有一個大洞穴.
Then at the lower trunk of this big, there exists a big cave

S.FORM: ma lhengo eniqan lhengo paru ka pusu na nii ani si bukuy pusuna ge eniqan maanu di a ga s a rcilungan qsiya.
S.PHON: ma lħeŋo eniqan lħeŋo paɾu ka pusu na nii ani si bukuj pusuna ge eniqan maanu di a ga s a ɾʦiluŋan qsija.
S.FORM: ma lhengo eniqan lhengo paru ka pusu na nii ani si bukuy pusuna ge eniqan maanu di a ga s a rcilungan qsiya.
S.PHON: ma lħeŋo eniqan lħeŋo paɾu ka pusu na nii ani si bukuj pusuna ge eniqan maanu di a ga s a ɾʦiluŋan qsija.
S.TRANSL: 然後洞穴... 大樹幹底部... 在樹幹底部的後方又積了一池水.
Then the cave... the big lower trunk... behind the lower trunk, there is even a pool of accumulated water.

S.FORM: ma qsiya kii na msbobo ka s nrcilunganna hii di na gcilung kii di na kika thuwe muda maanu di berahna ka qsiya nii musa mttuting quri icin.
S.PHON: ma qsija kii na msbobo ka s nɾʦiluŋanna ħii di na gʦiluŋ kii di na kika tħuwe muda maanu di beɾaħna ka qsija nii musa mttutiŋ quɾi iʦin.
S.FORM: ma qsiya kii na msbobo ka s nrcilunganna hii di na gcilung kii di na kika thuwe muda maanu di berahna ka qsiya nii musa mttuting quri icin.
S.PHON: ma qsija kii na msbobo ka s nɾʦiluŋanna ħii di na gʦiluŋ kii di na kika tħuwe muda maanu di beɾaħna ka qsija nii musa mttutiŋ quɾi iʦin.
S.TRANSL: 然後水... 積水溢出水池,慢慢流經它前面,到另外一邊.

TRANSL.notes: Then the water... the accumulated water overflowed the pool, and slowly flowed pass its (the tree) front to the other side.

S.TRANSL: Then the water... the accumulated water overflowed the pool, and slowly flowed pass its front to the other side.

S.FORM: ma pusu kika beling nii peni na kiya ka nsperuqan kesaun pusuta ba ita.
S.PHON: ma pusu kika beliŋ nii peni na kija ka nspeɾuqan kesaun pusuta ba ita.
S.FORM: ma pusu kika beling nii peni na kiya ka nsperuqan kesaun pusuta ba ita.
S.PHON: ma pusu kika beliŋ nii peni na kija ka nspeɾuqan kesaun pusuta ba ita.
S.TRANSL: 所以樹底這個洞穴,就是傳說中我們真正始祖起源之地.
So the cave at the lower trunk was reportedly the real birthplace of our ancestors.

S.FORM: rudan ru a pusuta ba rudan ita seediq mesa ka rudan ba rudanta cbeyo.
S.PHON: ɾudan ɾu a pusuta ba ɾudan ita seediq mesa ka ɾudan ba ɾudanta ʦbejo.
S.FORM: rudan ru a pusuta ba rudan ita seediq mesa ka rudan ba rudanta cbeyo.
S.PHON: ɾudan ɾu a pusuta ba ɾudan ita seediq mesa ka ɾudan ba ɾudanta ʦbejo.

TRANSL.notes: (那就是)我們賽德克始祖的真正起源,老人家說,我們過去真正的祖先.

S.TRANSL: 我們賽德克始祖的真正起源,老人家說,我們過去真正的祖先.

TRANSL.notes: (That is) the real origin of our ancestors, our Seediq ancestors, the elderly said, our real ancestors in the past.

S.TRANSL: the real origin of our ancestors, our Seediq ancestors, the elderly said, our real ancestors in the past.

S.FORM: kari nii ge uxe kari hndure nii uri ha kari ba kndalax cbeyo.
S.PHON: kaɾi nii ge uxe kaɾi ħnduɾe nii uɾi ħa kaɾi ba kndalax ʦbejo.
S.FORM: kari nii ge uxe kari hndure nii uri ha kari ba kndalax cbeyo.
S.PHON: kaɾi nii ge uxe kaɾi ħnduɾe nii uɾi ħa kaɾi ba kndalax ʦbejo.
S.TRANSL: 這個故事也不是最近才傳開的,而是來自過去.
This story was not recently told, but came from the past.

S.FORM: ma qitaun qitaun kesaun pusu qhuni nii na.
S.PHON: ma qitaun qitaun kesaun pusu qħuni nii na.
S.FORM: ma qitaun qitaun kesaun pusu qhuni nii na.
S.PHON: ma qitaun qitaun kesaun pusu qħuni nii na.
S.TRANSL: 然後看看這個傳說中的樹幹底部.
Then looking at this legendary lower trunk of the tree.

S.FORM: ye adoka gaga dgiyaq peni na qhuni ka bagana sa a kana ba bagana a daha bagana ma teerang we mgrabang mgrabang bhege ka teerangna.
S.PHON: je adoka gaga dgijaq peni na qħuni ka bagana sa a kana ba bagana a daħa bagana ma teeɾaŋ we mgɾabaŋ mgɾabaŋ bħege ka teeɾaŋna.
S.FORM: ye adoka gaga dgiyaq peni na qhuni ka bagana sa a kana ba bagana a daha bagana ma teerang we mgrabang mgrabang bhege ka teerangna.
S.PHON: je adoka gaga dgijaq peni na qħuni ka bagana sa a kana ba bagana a daħa bagana ma teeɾaŋ we mgɾabaŋ mgɾabaŋ bħege ka teeɾaŋna.
S.TRANSL: 或許因為樹幹底部坐落在山巒間,它的手是樹... 它的全部手... 它的兩隻手... ,然後灰白的胸膛,它的胸膛是灰白色.
Maybe because it exists in the mountains, its hands are trees... all its hands... both of its hands... and then the ashen chest, its chest is of the color ashen and white.

S.FORM: ma paru riyung qitaan a ma kika a ye ma mesa ka kari rudan.
S.PHON: ma paɾu ɾijuŋ qitaan a ma kika a je ma mesa ka kaɾi ɾudan.
S.FORM: ma paru riyung qitaan a ma kika a ye ma mesa ka kari rudan.
S.PHON: ma paɾu ɾijuŋ qitaan a ma kika a je ma mesa ka kaɾi ɾudan.
S.TRANSL: 然後,所以族老說看起來很大.

TRANSL.notes: Then, so the elderly said (it) looked very huge.

S.TRANSL: Then, so the elderly said looked very huge.

S.FORM: u ye ye sknuwan ka maanu di yani wada sbgihun paru peni na.
S.PHON: u je je sknuwan ka maanu di jani wada sbgiħun paɾu peni na.
S.FORM: u ye ye sknuwan ka maanu di yani wada sbgihun paru peni na.
S.PHON: u je je sknuwan ka maanu di jani wada sbgiħun paɾu peni na.
S.TRANSL: 不知道什麼時候,有一天起了大風.
No one knows when, one day there was a big wind.

S.FORM: wadana maanu di gerungan a bgihun ka bagana a bagana narac.
S.PHON: wadana maanu di geɾuŋan a bgiħun ka bagana a bagana naɾaʦ.
S.FORM: wadana maanu di gerungan a bgihun ka bagana a bagana narac.
S.PHON: wadana maanu di geɾuŋan a bgiħun ka bagana a bagana naɾaʦ.
S.TRANSL: 風折斷它的手... 它的右手.
The wind snapped its hand... its right hand.

S.FORM: hon ma ba bagana narac narac nii na wada mgerung.
S.PHON: ħon ma ba bagana naɾaʦ naɾaʦ nii na wada mgeɾuŋ.
S.FORM: hon ma ba bagana narac narac nii na wada mgerung.
S.PHON: ħon ma ba bagana naɾaʦ naɾaʦ nii na wada mgeɾuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 然後它的右手斷了.
Then this right hand broke.

S.FORM: ma msngari a bagana irin ka msngari dehuk saya mesa.
S.PHON: ma msŋaɾi a bagana iɾin ka msŋaɾi deħuk saja mesa.
S.FORM: ma msngari a bagana irin ka msngari dehuk saya mesa.
S.PHON: ma msŋaɾi a bagana iɾin ka msŋaɾi deħuk saja mesa.
S.TRANSL: 然後據說至今只剩下左手了.
Then only the left hand remains until today, it is said.

S.FORM: ma kika pusu kesaunsumu beling kika pntutinganna rudanta kika cbeyo peni na.
S.PHON: ma kika pusu kesaunsumu beliŋ kika pntutiŋanna ɾudanta kika ʦbejo peni na.
S.FORM: ma kika pusu kesaunsumu beling kika pntutinganna rudanta kika cbeyo peni na.
S.PHON: ma kika pusu kesaunsumu beliŋ kika pntutiŋanna ɾudanta kika ʦbejo peni na.
S.TRANSL: 然後,我跟你說的樹幹底部... 這個岩洞就是我們祖先以前誕生之處.
Then, the lower trunk I told you... the cave was the birthplace of our ancestors in the past.

S.FORM: kiya si a maanu di ciida si na da e karidaha na.
S.PHON: kija si a maanu di ʦiida si na da e kaɾidaħa na.
S.FORM: kiya si a maanu di ciida si na da e karidaha na.
S.PHON: kija si a maanu di ʦiida si na da e kaɾidaħa na.
S.TRANSL: 那就是他們當時的故事.
That is their story then.

S.FORM: daha klegan karidaha kingan we.
S.PHON: daħa klegan kaɾidaħa kiŋan we.
S.FORM: daha klegan karidaha kingan we.
S.PHON: daħa klegan kaɾidaħa kiŋan we.
S.TRANSL: 他們的故事,有兩種說法.
There are two versions of their story.

S.FORM: kingan mqedin ma kingan rseno pnsperuq hiya mesa.
S.PHON: kiŋan mqedin ma kiŋan ɾseno pnspeɾuq ħija mesa.
S.FORM: kingan mqedin ma kingan rseno pnsperuq hiya mesa.
S.PHON: kiŋan mqedin ma kiŋan ɾseno pnspeɾuq ħija mesa.
S.TRANSL: 據說一男一女在那裏誕生.
A woman and a man were said to be born there

S.FORM: ma kingan karidaha we kingan mqedin ma daha rseno mesa.
S.PHON: ma kiŋan kaɾidaħa we kiŋan mqedin ma daħa ɾseno mesa.
S.FORM: ma kingan karidaha we kingan mqedin ma daha rseno mesa.
S.PHON: ma kiŋan kaɾidaħa we kiŋan mqedin ma daħa ɾseno mesa.
S.TRANSL: 另一種故事說一女兩男.
The other story says one woman and two men.

S.FORM: ma kika kingan mqedin kingan rseno nii e kika wada m prana ita di mesa ka rudan ha.
S.PHON: ma kika kiŋan mqedin kiŋan ɾseno nii e kika wada m pɾana ita di mesa ka ɾudan ħa.
S.FORM: ma kika kingan mqedin kingan rseno nii e kika wada m prana ita di mesa ka rudan ha.
S.PHON: ma kika kiŋan mqedin kiŋan ɾseno nii e kika wada m pɾana ita di mesa ka ɾudan ħa.
S.TRANSL: 族老說那一女一男,就是繁衍我族的祖先.
The elders said that these one man and woman reproduced us.

S.FORM: netun so daha rseno kingan mqedin na daha ru daha bale a da teru mu teru seediq nii na msperuq ciida.
S.PHON: netun so daħa ɾseno kiŋan mqedin na daħa ɾu daħa bale a da teɾu mu teɾu seediq nii na mspeɾuq ʦiida.
S.FORM: netun so daha rseno kingan mqedin na daha ru daha bale a da teru mu teru seediq nii na msperuq ciida.
S.PHON: netun so daħa ɾseno kiŋan mqedin na daħa ɾu daħa bale a da teɾu mu teɾu seediq nii na mspeɾuq ʦiida.
S.TRANSL: 兩男一女,這三個人呢那時候誕生.
Two men and one woman, these three people were born then.

S.FORM: ma kingan mqedin ma daha rseno.
S.PHON: ma kiŋan mqedin ma daħa ɾseno.
S.FORM: ma kingan mqedin ma daha rseno.
S.PHON: ma kiŋan mqedin ma daħa ɾseno.
S.TRANSL: 是一女兩男.

TRANSL.notes: (They are) one woman and two men.

S.TRANSL: one woman and two men.

S.FORM: ma eniqan kingan rseno ge ma mesa qmita kesaun gata eniqan bobo dheran nii peni.
S.PHON: ma eniqan kiŋan ɾseno ge ma mesa qmita kesaun gata eniqan bobo dħeɾan nii peni.
S.FORM: ma eniqan kingan rseno ge ma mesa qmita kesaun gata eniqan bobo dheran nii peni.
S.PHON: ma eniqan kiŋan ɾseno ge ma mesa qmita kesaun gata eniqan bobo dħeɾan nii peni.
S.TRANSL: 然後一個男人看著我們現在居住的世界.
Then one man looked at the world where we now live.

S.FORM: ma uxe nii di uka ani maanu mesa si.
S.PHON: ma uxe nii di uka ani maanu mesa si.
S.FORM: ma uxe nii di uka ani maanu mesa si.
S.PHON: ma uxe nii di uka ani maanu mesa si.
S.TRANSL: 「為什麼什麼都沒有?」,他說.
"Why isn't there anything?" said.

S.FORM: maha kaku da uxeku menaq hini yamu naq enaq hini di mesa.
S.PHON: maħa kaku da uxeku menaq ħini jamu naq enaq ħini di mesa.
S.FORM: maha kaku da uxeku menaq hini yamu naq enaq hini di mesa.
S.PHON: maħa kaku da uxeku menaq ħini jamu naq enaq ħini di mesa.
S.TRANSL: 「我要走了,我不待在這裡,你們自己居住在這裡吧.」他說.

TRANSL.notes: "I am leaving. I'm not staying here. You stay here on your own." (he) said.

S.TRANSL: "I am leaving. I'm not staying here. You stay here on your own." said.

S.FORM: kika irih so daha kingan mqedin kingan a rseno ka dheya kiya uri.
S.PHON: kika iɾiħ so daħa kiŋan mqedin kiŋan a ɾseno ka dħeja kija uɾi.
S.FORM: kika irih so daha kingan mqedin kingan a rseno ka dheya kiya uri.
S.PHON: kika iɾiħ so daħa kiŋan mqedin kiŋan a ɾseno ka dħeja kija uɾi.

TRANSL.notes: 所以,可以說(一女兩男的傳說)相似於一女一男的傳說.

S.TRANSL: 所以,可以說 相似於一女一男的傳說.

TRANSL.notes: Therefore, (the story of one woman and two men) is similar to the story of one woman and one man.

S.TRANSL: Therefore, is similar to the story of one woman and one man.

S.FORM: ma kingan rseno daka kingan mqedin nii ka kiya ka pusuta bale ita.
S.PHON: ma kiŋan ɾseno daka kiŋan mqedin nii ka kija ka pusuta bale ita.
S.FORM: ma kingan rseno daka kingan mqedin nii ka kiya ka pusuta bale ita.
S.PHON: ma kiŋan ɾseno daka kiŋan mqedin nii ka kija ka pusuta bale ita.
S.TRANSL: 這一男一女真的就是我們的根源.
This one man and woman are our real origin.

S.FORM: rudanta ita kesaun seediq mesa.
S.PHON: ɾudanta ita kesaun seediq mesa.
S.FORM: rudanta ita kesaun seediq mesa.
S.PHON: ɾudanta ita kesaun seediq mesa.
S.TRANSL: 他們據說就是我們賽德克人的祖先.
They are said to be the ancestors of us, the Seediq.

S.FORM: karidaha e rudanta dehuk saya.
S.PHON: kaɾidaħa e ɾudanta deħuk saja.
S.FORM: karidaha e rudanta dehuk saya.
S.PHON: kaɾidaħa e ɾudanta deħuk saja.
S.TRANSL: 即使到了今天,我們族老們都還這麼說.
Our elders said so even until now.
